extortion.description: Army Welfare Trust: VISION To be one of the leading business houses employing best business practices. MISSION To undertake safe and profitable commercial activities in a manner that portrays AWT's image as a respected market leader while generating maximum funds for meeting the welfare requirements of the Army. CORE VALUES We have an unwavering commitment of being a good partner, focused on building productive, collaborative, trusting and beneficial relationships with governments, other companies, customers, communities and each other.
